summary: Completed testing of Onboarding Tutorial and Course/Lesson Wizard flows. All features working correctly. Onboarding shows for new users (onboarding_complete=false), can be completed by clicking through 5 steps or skipped. CourseWizard opens on 'Create Course' click with validation. LessonWizard automatically triggers after course creation. All 5 wizard steps work correctly.
passed_tests: Login flow with teacher credentials (teacher@sundayschool.com / teacher123)
Onboarding tutorial shows on first login for users with onboarding_complete=false
Onboarding shows 5 steps with progress dots for teachers
Onboarding can be completed by clicking through all steps (Next button)
Onboarding final step shows 'Get Started' button
Onboarding 'Skip tour' button works - dismisses tutorial
After onboarding complete, it does not show again on next login
CourseWizard opens when clicking 'Create Course' button
CourseWizard shows 2-step wizard (Course Details -> Review & Create)
CourseWizard Continue button disabled without required fields (title, description)
CourseWizard Continue button enabled after filling required fields
CourseWizard shows review step ('Almost There!') before creation
CourseWizard has 'Save as Draft' and 'Create & Publish' buttons
After creating course, LessonWizard automatically opens with toast 'Course created! Now let's add your first lesson.'
LessonWizard shows correct course name in header
LessonWizard has all 5 steps (Basics, Hosting, Recording, Content, Review)
LessonWizard Step 1 (Basics): Title, Description, Date fields
LessonWizard Step 2 (Hosting): In-App Video Room and Zoom options
LessonWizard Step 3 (Recording): Daily, YouTube, External, None options
LessonWizard Step 4 (Content): Teacher Notes and Reading Plan fields
LessonWizard Step 5 (Review): Shows lesson summary before creation
LessonWizard Cancel button (on step 1) redirects to course detail page
seed_data_creation: Created test courses during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding and Wizard flows fully implemented and working. To test onboarding again, clear user_onboarding collection: db.user_onboarding.deleteMany({}). CourseWizard -> LessonWizard flow automatically chains. All wizard steps have proper validation and navigation. Cancel button redirects to course page after course is created.
